title: [Broken Lands, Passage]
description: Incandescent globes hang at set intervals along the passage, casting an eerie light over it.  A symphony of shadows is played out along the walls, giving the impression that this passage is not as empty as it appears.

wayto.6631: ;e if celerity = Spell[506] and celerity.known? and celerity.affordable? and not celerity.active?; celerity.cast; end; until dothistimeout('search', 3, /anything of interest|concealed door/) =~ /concealed door/ do end; move 'go door'
